task: Transfer all large pipette tips from one holder to another holder for large pipette tips
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - Two clear plastic pipette tip holders are on a blue mat. Each holder has a vertical array of large pipette tips. The holders are rigid, with tips inserted into slots. The task requires moving all tips from one holder to the other. STRATEGY - First, grasp the top tip from the source holder, transport it to the destination holder, and place it. Repeat for all tips in the source holder. Failure modes include dropping tips during transport or misaligning them in the destination holder. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the source holder to grasp the top tip. Step 2: Grasp the tip from the source holder. Step 3: Transport the tip to the destination holder. Step 4: Place the tip in the destination holder. Repeat Steps 2-4 for all tips in the source holder.
Goal: all_inside(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder); all_on(large_pipette_tip, source_holder) -> all_inside(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder)
Scene: source_holder, destination_holder, large_pipette_tip, blue_mat
Step 1: reach(source_holder)
  affordance_region: the body of the source holder
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, source_holder, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, source_holder) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(large_pipette_tip)
  affordance_region: the top tip in the source_holder
  contact: holding(large_pipette_tip) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(large_pipette_tip)
Step 3: transport(large_pipette_tip -> destination_holder)
  affordance_region: an empty slot in the destination_holder
  spatial: above(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(large_pipette_tip)
  done_when: above(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder, 0.05)
Step 4: place(large_pipette_tip -> destination_holder)
  affordance_region: an empty slot in the destination_holder
  contact: inside(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder) [completion]; released(large_pipette_tip) [completion]
  pose: stable(large_pipette_tip) [completion]
  done_when: inside(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder) AND released(large_pipette_tip)
Step 5: repeat Steps 2-4 for all remaining large_pipette_tip in source_holder
  affordance_region: the next tip in the source_holder
  contact: holding(large_pipette_tip) [completion]
  spatial: above(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(large_pipette_tip)
  done_when: inside(large_pipette_tip, destination_holder) AND released(large_pipette_tip)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the source holder
the top tip in the source_holder
an empty slot in the destination_holder
an empty slot in the destination_holder
